# What Are “Feminized” Cannabis Seeds?
_Last updated Feb 28, 2026_
by Nebula Haze
**Why should every home grower start with “feminized” cannabis seeds?** It saves time and money, prevents seedy buds, and maximizes yields for an efficient home cannabis grow. ([Where can I get cannabis seeds?](https://www.growweedeasy.com/seeds))
Every feminized seed grows buds ([check out my review](https://www.growweedeasy.com/a-review-on-the-5-strains-i-just-grew) of feminized [Blue Dream](https://seedsupreme.com/blue-dream-feminized.html#grower))
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/huge-blue-dream-cola-white-pistils-not-ready-harvest-growweedeasy-com.jpg)
**What are “feminized” cannabis seeds** and how are they different from regular cannabis seeds?
Feminized cannabis seeds are created to ensure that **all the resulting cannabis plants are female**. This is extremely convenient for home growers. Why? Because **only female cannabis plants make buds.**
“Regular” (or non-feminized) seeds will produce about half male, and half female plants.
Having male plants can be an asset to a [breeding program](https://www.growweedeasy.com/advanced-breeding-techniques), but having to watch over and throw away half the plants can feel like a waste of time and space for growers who just want to grow their own supply of bud!
By starting your grow with feminized cannabis seeds from a [reputable breeder](https://www.growweedeasy.com/trusted-cannabis-breeders), you can stop worrying about plant gender altogether and know that every one of your plants will be female and make buds!
[Seed Supreme](https://seedsupreme.com#grower) is a trustworthy source of [feminized cannabis seeds](https://www.northatlanticseed.com/seed-type/feminized/ref/63951/?orderby=popularity) (it’s the company I currently use for seeds)
****
**Pros of Feminized Cannabis Seeds**
  * **Every plant grows buds** – With feminized seeds, all cannabis plants end up producing buds.
  * **Less wasted space** on plants that need to be thrown away.
  * **No need to babysit plants** closely to make sure you quickly identify and remove male plants.
  * **No seedy buds** – No chance of pollination without pollen sacs, so feminized seeds prevent seedy buds.

**Cons of Feminized Cannabis Seeds**
  * **Not ideal for breeding programs** – In order to build a robust [breeding program](https://www.growweedeasy.com/advanced-breeding-techniques) and create new strains, you should start with regular seeds so you have both male and female plants.
  * **Herms from low-quality breeders** – It’s possible to buy feminized seeds from bad breeders [which turn into problematic hermies](https://www.growweedeasy.com/feminized-seeds-hermies) (mixed-sex plants) or even just end up being half male plants like regular seeds. That’s why it’s important to order your feminized cannabis seeds from a trustworthy breeder.

Since I started growing cannabis over a decade ago, I’ve grown primarily with feminized seeds. As a result, I’m never surprised by an unexpected male plant that has to be thrown away.
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/sea-young-flowering-cannabis-buds-canopy.jpg)
**Non-Feminized Seeds Produce Half Male, Half Female Plants**  
[(learn more more about cannabis plant sex)](https://www.growweedeasy.com/marijuana-boy-girl)
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2013/03/male-flowering-plant.jpg)[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2013/03/female-flowering-plant.jpg)
**Feminized Seeds _Only_ Produce Female Plants**
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/before-harvest-cannabis.jpg)
[Get Feminized Seeds From a Trustworthy Seed Source](https://www.growweedeasy.com/seeds)
**How Do Breeders Make Feminized Seeds?**
Breeders create feminized seeds by breeding two female cannabis plants together, which means that all the resulting offspring will be female. This is done by spraying developing flowers with a substance that changes flower development (often [colloidal silver](https://www.amazon.com/Silver-Mountain-Minerals-Bioavailable-colloidally/dp/B01CZC7R7E/ref=as_li_ss_tl?_encoding=UTF8&pd_rd_i=B01CZC7R7E&pd_rd_r=4REVNF94CBKS9NDPYXTD&pd_rd_w=I4ixu&pd_rd_wg=OAPlO&psc=1&refRID=4REVNF94CBKS9NDPYXTD&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=e617fa1b8754ffca8909f3ba5a7b7278) or [gibberellic acid](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B08R434VMD?psc=1&pd_rd_i=B08R434VMD&pd_rd_w=VQLCP&pf_rd_p=887084a2-5c34-4113-a4f8-b7947847c308&pd_rd_wg=4HrKf&pf_rd_r=EPAKDVWSXSV93TGGWPXZ&pd_rd_r=7fe758c1-7943-4f39-8098-113122c38dd7&spLa=ZW5jcnlwdGVkUXVhbGlmaWVyPUFKODkwMFRQMDVFNTMmZW5jcnlwdGVkSWQ9QTAxNjcxNzAxMlJEUVdQWEtGV1JDJmVuY3J5cHRlZEFkSWQ9QTA5NzUyOTUxVkM4N0ZMN05YVEdJJndpZGdldE5hbWU9c3BfZGV0YWlsJmFjdGlvbj1jbGlja1JlZGlyZWN0JmRvTm90TG9nQ2xpY2s9dHJ1ZQ%3D%3D&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=f394cb95ab71f82b029017d809e309d9&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)). This process forces one of the female cannabis plants to start producing pollen sacs, just like a male plant.
By harvesting the pollen sacs and using the “female” pollen to pollinate buds of a different female plant, you are giving the resulting seeds only female genes (there is no “father”), so none of the cannabis seedlings end up being male.
[Learn how to make your own feminized seeds at home!](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-make-feminized-seeds)
